title: Post-Quantum Cryptography Standardization Project
summary: Hub of NIST's Post-Quantum Cryptography project, which leads the national and global effort to standardise cryptographic algorithms secure against future quantum computers.

title: Migration to Post-Quantum Cryptography
summary: NCCoE project translating PQC standards into practice, addressing the discovery of quantum-vulnerable public-key algorithms in hardware, software and services in collaboration with industry.

title: What Is Post-Quantum Cryptography?
summary: NIST explainer describing post-quantum cryptography as a defence against potential cyberattacks from quantum computers and distinguishing it from quantum cryptography.

title: Post-Quantum Cryptography Project FAQs
summary: Frequently asked questions for NIST's PQC standardization project, covering technical implementation details such as acceptable key-pair and KeyGen seed formats.

title: New Draft White Paper: PQC Migration - Mappings to Risk Framework Documents
summary: NCCoE announcement of a draft white paper from its Migration to PQC project, a collaboration with industry, mapping post-quantum cryptography migration to risk-framework documents.

title: Transition to Post-Quantum Cryptography Standards (NIST IR 8547, initial public draft)
summary: Initial public draft setting out the transition from quantum-vulnerable cryptographic algorithms to the three post-quantum cryptography standards NIST has released.

title: Post-Quantum Cryptography Initiative
summary: CISA initiative to unify and drive efforts with interagency and industry partners to address the threats posed by quantum computing to cryptography.

title: Product Categories for Technologies That Use Post-Quantum Cryptography Standards
summary: Guidance identifying hardware and software product categories that currently support or are expected to support post-quantum cryptography standards, to aid PQC adoption.

title: Quantum-Readiness: Migration to Post-Quantum Cryptography
summary: Joint CISA, NSA and NIST factsheet with recommendations to establish a Quantum-Readiness Roadmap and steps to prepare migration to post-quantum cryptography.

title: Post-Quantum Considerations for Operational Technology
summary: Examines the specific risks quantum computing could pose to industrial control systems and other operational technology, building on CISA's post-quantum migration work.

title: Strategy for Migrating to Automated Post-Quantum Cryptography Discovery and Inventory Tools
summary: CISA strategy for moving federal agencies to automated PQC discovery and inventory tooling, following OMB Memorandum M-23-02 on migrating to post-quantum cryptography.

title: Post-Quantum Cybersecurity Resources
summary: NSA resource page on post-quantum cybersecurity, including the agency's position on quantum key distribution and quantum-resistant algorithms for National Security Systems.

title: NSA's Cybersecurity Perspective on Post-Quantum Cryptography Algorithms
summary: States NSA CSD's position that it does not currently anticipate approving additional post-quantum cryptographic technologies for National Security Systems usage.

title: CSfC Post-Quantum Cryptography Guidance Addendum 1.0 (Draft 5)
summary: Draft addendum to the Commercial Solutions for Classified capability packages clarifying the usage of post-quantum cryptography technologies and product selections.

title: NSA Releases Future Quantum-Resistant (QR) Algorithm Requirements for National Security Systems (CNSA 2.0)
summary: Announces the Commercial National Security Algorithm Suite 2.0, algorithms analysed as secure against both classical and quantum computers that will eventually be required for National Security Systems.

title: Cybersecurity Speaker Series: Preparing for Post-Quantum
summary: NSA news highlight for a Cybersecurity Speaker Series episode on preparing for post-quantum cryptography; video content rather than a policy document.

title: Memorandum M-23-02: Migrating to Post-Quantum Cryptography
summary: OMB memorandum describing preparatory steps federal agencies must take to begin their transition to PQC, starting with a prioritised cryptographic inventory.

title: Executive Order: Sustaining Select Efforts to Strengthen the Nation's Cybersecurity and Amending Executive Order 13694 and Executive Order 14144
summary: Executive order directing preparation for the transition to post-quantum cryptography, including agency-level actions due by December 1, 2025, once PQC products are widely available.

title: President Trump's Cyber Strategy for America
summary: National cyber strategy committing to promote the adoption of post-quantum cryptography and secure quantum computing, alongside securing the AI technology stack.

title: Strengthening American Leadership in Digital Financial Technology (Report under EO 14178)
summary: White House digital assets report referencing NIST's post-quantum cryptography standardization project, launched in 2016 to solicit, evaluate and standardise quantum-resistant algorithms.

title: Memorandum M-25-34: Fiscal Year 2027 Administration Research and Development Budget Priorities and Cross-Cutting Actions
summary: OMB memorandum setting FY 2027 federal R&D budget priorities; surfaced in post-quantum cryptography search results but the candidate text shows no explicit PQC reference.

title: Report on Post-Quantum Cryptography
summary: White House report describing how post-quantum cryptography addresses the security challenge posed by cryptanalytically relevant quantum computers through different mathematical algorithms.

title: National Cybersecurity Strategy Implementation Plan (Version 2)
summary: Second version of the National Cybersecurity Strategy implementation plan, including the initiative 'Prepare for Our Post-Quantum Future' and assessment of PQC impacts on the supply chain.

title: OFCIO Impact Report 2024
summary: OMB Office of the Federal CIO impact report noting initiating steps for federal agency migration to post-quantum cryptography and the establishment of an interagency PQC Migration Working Group.

title: Technical Design Choices for a U.S. Central Bank Digital Currency System
summary: White House technical analysis of design choices for a potential U.S. CBDC system, raising questions on how quantum computers would affect public-key cryptography and how the system would change post-quantum.

title: Playbook for Strengthening Cybersecurity in Federal Grant Programs
summary: Playbook for embedding cybersecurity in federal grant programs; its template material references post-quantum cryptography among mitigation measures, but PQC is not the document's subject.

title: 2024 Report on the Cybersecurity Posture of the United States
summary: Annual posture report describing federal engagement with stakeholders to prepare for a post-quantum future, including NIST's August 2023 submission of draft PQC standards for public comment.

title: Post-Quantum Cryptography
summary: DHS guidance hub to help organisations prepare for the transition to post-quantum cryptography by identifying, prioritising and protecting potentially vulnerable data and systems.

title: Memorandum on Preparing for Post-Quantum Cryptography
summary: DHS memorandum providing guidance to component heads to begin preparing the transition from current cryptography standards to post-quantum cryptography.

title: Post-Quantum Cryptography Frequently Asked Questions
summary: FAQ document on post-quantum cryptography accompanying the DHS roadmap, noting NIST's plan to publish PQC standards in 2024.

title: Preparing for Post-Quantum Cryptography (Infographic)
summary: Infographic guide to help organisations create effective plans to ensure the continued security of essential data against the post-quantum threat.

title: Post Quantum Cybersecurity Standards Act (H.R. 3259, 119th Congress) - Bill Text
summary: Bill amending the National Quantum Initiative Act and the Cyber Security Research and Development Act to advance rapid deployment of post-quantum cybersecurity standards across the U.S. economy and support cryptography research at NIST and NSF.

title: Preparing Secrets for a Post-Quantum World - National Security Memorandum 10
summary: Congressional Research Service insight on National Security Memorandum 10, signed by President Biden on May 4, 2022, which directs U.S. preparation for the post-quantum transition.

title: S. 3312 (119th Congress) - Introduced Senate Bill
summary: Senate bill introduced in the first session of the 119th Congress, surfaced in post-quantum cryptography search results; the candidate text does not show its subject matter.

title: S. 2558 (119th Congress) - Introduced Senate Bill on Federal Quantum Migration Assessment
summary: Senate bill requiring the Subcommittee on the Economic and Security Implications of Quantum Information Science to assess possible migration by federal entities; explicit PQC wording not visible in the candidate text.

title: Science & Tech Spotlight: Securing Data for a Post-Quantum World
summary: GAO science and technology spotlight on post-quantum cryptography, the new encryption methods being developed and standardised to counter cryptographically relevant quantum computers.

title: Leadership Needed to Coordinate Cyber Threat Mitigation Strategy (GAO-25-108590)
summary: GAO report identifying central goals of the national quantum threat mitigation strategy, including standardising post-quantum cryptography, and noting the cost and challenge of migrating federal systems to PQC.

title: Future of Cybersecurity: Leadership Needed to Fully Define Quantum Threat Mitigation Strategy (GAO-25-107703)
summary: GAO report on quantum threat mitigation noting that OMB's Report on Post-Quantum Cryptography provided a migration cost estimate of $7.1 billion and reviewing how PQC standards documents were developed.
